title: justicia graphocaula
intro: Justicia graphocaula, also known as the Painted Tongue, is a species of flowering plant in the family Acanthaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Justicia graphocaula include treating fever, sore throats, and digestive issues, as well as reducing inflammation and promoting wound healing. Herbal preparations of Justicia graphocaula can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to treat various health conditions.
